scripts.build:engine: cmake -S services/engine-cpp -B services/engine-cpp/build -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build services/engine-cpp/build -j
scripts.dev:full: pnpm run build:engine && pnpm run dev
scripts.build: pnpm -r --if-present run build && pnpm run build:engine
scripts.analytics: pnpm analytics:generate && pnpm analytics:run && pnpm analytics:aggregate && pnpm analytics:report
scripts.analytics:setup: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install polars==1.14.0 matplotlib==3.9.2 duckdb==1.1.3
scripts.test: pnpm -r --if-present run test && pnpm run build:engine && ctest --test-dir services/engine-cpp/build --output-on-failure
